verse_text: Then he shall offer his gift to the Lord: one male lamb in its first year without blemish as a whole burnt offering, one ewe lamb in its first year without blemish as a sin offering, one ram without blemish as a peace offering,

links.context: The vow Paul makes is likely a form of the Nazirite vow ([[NUM.6:1]]-21) given in thanksgiving for deliverance from danger.
